name: Aviara Design Co.
description: A licensed and insured family-owned home staging and interior design studio crafting livable luxury spaces across Southern California.
licensing: Licensed & Insured · Family Owned · Southern California

hero.bgImageAlt: Fully staged living room with neutral palette, brass accents, and natural light
hero.subhead: A licensed, family-owned home staging and interior design studio creating spaces that feel both elevated and inviting, across Temecula, San Diego, Orange County, and the Inland Empire.

about.headlineLine1: Spaces designed for the way you actually
bodyParagraphs: Aviara Design Co. is a boutique home staging and interior design studio, family-owned and based in Temecula, California. We believe that staging and design are more than aesthetics. They are powerful tools for connection, storytelling, and transformation.
Whether we are preparing a luxury listing for market or composing a forever home, our work is unified by a single intent: livable luxury that feels collected, considered, and quietly elevated.
about.imageAlt: A signature Aviara styled vignette: white pottery vase with deep red blooms

services.headlineLine1: A focused practice. Every service treated as a
services.intro: From single-room consultations to full vacant installs, our work is designed to translate cleanly to camera and to life.

process.intro: From the first walkthrough to the final styled vignette, every project moves through the same four-step rhythm, designed to protect your time and elevate your home.

team.intro: Aviara is run by Brooklyn alongside her husband and brother. You'll meet the same three faces from the first walkthrough to the final styled vignette. No layered hand-offs, no template installs.

portfolio.intro: Three different houses, three different briefs. One studio behind every install.

testimonials.headlineLine1: Trusted by agents and homeowners across
testimonials.imageAlt: A signature Aviara styled vignette: black candle on a marble side table

contact.intro: Tell us about your home, your timeline, and what you're hoping to feel when the install is done. We'll be in touch within one business day.
